raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The gap statement and contribution claims ('first to evaluate…', 'first study to quantify…') are the argumentative spine of this abstract; making it stronger centrally requires tightening how the thesis and gap are framed, not just how they are phrased.","R1.4":"Two explicit first-mover novelty claims are asserted; making the abstract stronger requires that those claims be precisely scoped and credibly bounded, since over-broad 'first' language is a common source of weakness in this genre.","R1.6":"'Make this stronger' most directly licenses prose-level intervention — sentence punch, word choice, rhetorical momentum, elimination of hedged or redundant phrasing — and this is load-bearing regardless of what else is in scope."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I also evaluate and challenge the internal logic of the argument and the evidentiary grounding of specific quantitative claims (e.g., '90% in some markets', 'indistinguishable from commitment-agnostic'), or is the scope limited to prose quality and sharpening the contribution and novelty framing?"}

rationale.R1.1: The gap statement and contribution claims ('first to evaluate…', 'first study to quantify…') are the argumentative spine of this abstract; making it stronger centrally requires tightening how the thesis and gap are framed, not just how they are phrased.
rationale.R1.4: Two explicit first-mover novelty claims are asserted; making the abstract stronger requires that those claims be precisely scoped and credibly bounded, since over-broad 'first' language is a common source of weakness in this genre.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' most directly licenses prose-level intervention — sentence punch, word choice, rhetorical momentum, elimination of hedged or redundant phrasing — and this is load-bearing regardless of what else is in scope.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I also evaluate and challenge the internal logic of the argument and the evidentiary grounding of specific quantitative claims (e.g., '90% in some markets', 'indistinguishable from commitment-agnostic'), or is the scope limited to prose quality and sharpening the contribution and novelty framing?
